data.narrative: The student successfully completed a production-ready Dockerfile using a multi-stage build, Debian Slim as the base image, and a non-root user. The service was verified through Docker and health endpoints, demonstrating an understanding of reproducible and secure containerization.

dimension_scores.observation: Built a production-ready Docker image using a multi-stage Dockerfile.
dimension_scores.evidence: Implemented multi-stage build, Debian Slim base image, non-root user and verified the container.

dimension_scores.observation: Understands the role of build stages but has not yet implemented CI/CD.
dimension_scores.evidence: Module completed without an automated deployment pipeline.

dimension_scores.observation: Verified application health using health endpoints.
Recognized common Docker issues and resolved build problems.
dimension_scores.evidence: Diagnosed cache, COPY order and .dockerignore related issues.

dimension_scores.observation: Basic understanding demonstrated during container verification.
dimension_scores.evidence: Container continued to run correctly after verification.

dimension_scores.observation: Followed module instructions and verification process.
dimension_scores.evidence: Completed Docker build and verification commands.

strengths: Successfully created a secure multi-stage Docker image.
Verified the application using Docker and health endpoints.
growth_areas: Learn to automate builds using CI/CD pipelines.
Improve operational documentation and deployment automation.
data.recommendation: In the next module, focus on designing an automated CI/CD pipeline that builds, tests and deploys the Docker image.

public_evidence.technical_detail: Multi-stage build with Debian Slim, non-root user and optimized image.
public_evidence.proof: Docker image built successfully and application started inside the container.
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Demonstrates ability to package applications for production deployment.

concepts_demonstrated.evidence: Successfully built and verified the production image.

teaching_approaches.detail: Built and tested a production Docker image.

learning_style_signals: Hands-on learning through implementation and verification.
